ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., web, mobile app, phone) */,
  "order_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the order was placed (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date once the order is delivered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the order was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_line_items" (
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the line item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the line item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "lineitem_total" REAL /* Total cost of the line item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "discount_per_unit" REAL /* Discount applied per unit */,
  "tax_per_unit" REAL /* Tax amount per unit */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the line item was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_line_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_line_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) for the product */,
  "barcode" TEXT /* Barcode of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (length, width, height) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the product information was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_items" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the work item is associated with */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., packaging, shipping, quality control) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* ID of the employee assigned to the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the task */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the task */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the task in days */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the work item was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
